title: Bladhia amboinensis
taxonomy: Bladhia amboinensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. It belongs to the genus Bladhia and is native to the tropical regions of the world. The plant is also known as the Amboyna leaf or Bladh's tree. Further classification of Bladhia amboinensis includes its order, Malpighiales, and class, Magnoliopsida. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
uses: Bladhia amboinensis is a lesser-known plant species, and as such, its medicinal uses are limited in available information.
